name: One in a Hundred
overview: Baili Qianchuan, a struggling idol rents an apartment from Nan Bowan, a high-ranking executive, but a livestream mishap sparks rumors of their romance. Seeing an opportunity for fame, Baili Qianchuan plays along, turning their fake relationship into a viral sensation—until unexpected feelings get in the way.

trailers.title: One in a Hundred | Official Trailer | From the author of Chinese BL phenomenon "Addicted".
